rationale: The cited paper appears to be a direct foundational prior in the same WOM domain: it studies online vs. offline WOM and brand-level WOM volume drivers, while the citing paper explicitly says it extends prior aggregate WOM volume/generation and offline-versus-online WOM research. This is more than an incidental mention because the citing contribution is framed as moving from that antecedent/aggregate stream to conversation-level impact outcomes. With this clear thematic and theoretical linkage, the pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
